deflection: That is beyond my calling, child. I deal in matters of the spirit.
The divine has not granted me wisdom in such things. Ask elsewhere.
I am a servant of the light, not a font of worldly knowledge.
Seek the scholars for that. My domain is faith and healing.
greetings: Blessings upon you, {player_name}. How may I serve?
Welcome, child. The light shines upon all who enter here.
Peace be with you. What brings you to this sacred place?
Ah, {player_name}. The gods smile on {town} today.
Enter freely. All are welcome in the house of the divine.
farewells: Go with the light, {player_name}. May it guide your path.
The gods watch over you. Be safe in your travels.
Until we meet again. My prayers go with you.
thanks_responses: It is the gods you should thank, not a humble servant.
Your gratitude warms my heart. The light works through us all.
insult_responses: I will pray for your troubled spirit, {player_name}.
Anger and spite wound the soul. I forgive you freely.
Even harsh words cannot shake my faith. I hope you find peace.
no_match_responses: I am not sure I follow, child. Ask me about faith, blessings, or healing.
Hmm? Forgive me, my mind was in prayer. What did you say?
I do not understand. Perhaps you seek spiritual guidance?
That is unclear to me. I know matters of faith and the divine.

responses.text: Faith is the foundation of all strength. Without it, even the mightiest warrior crumbles.
The gods do not demand perfection. They ask only that we try to be better each day.
I have served the temple for thirty years. My faith has never wavered, though it has been tested.
Every soul in {town} carries a spark of the divine. Even those who do not believe.
Faith is not about certainty. It is about trust in something greater than ourselves.
I can offer a blessing of protection for your journey. The road is dangerous.
Blessings are not magic tricks. They are the focused will of the divine, channeled through faith.
I blessed the town gates this morning. May they hold against whatever darkness comes.
A blessing for a {player_race}? Of course. The divine does not discriminate.
I have already blessed you, {player_name}. The divine remembers.
The pantheon watches over us all. Each god governs a domain, but together they keep the world in balance.
Helios, the Sun Eternal, is patron of this temple. His light drives back the darkness.
Some worship one god, others many. I believe all paths lead to the same divine truth.
The gods are not distant rulers. They walk among us in small mercies and quiet miracles.
We spoke of the gods before. Their nature does not change with repetition, {player_name}.
Right and wrong are not always clear. But the intent of your heart matters more than the outcome.
Every soul struggles between light and shadow. The struggle itself is what makes us worthy.
I do not judge, {player_name}. That is for the gods. I only guide those who seek guidance.
True virtue is not the absence of temptation. It is choosing rightly despite it.
You seek redemption? The path begins with honesty. Admit your wrongs and resolve to do better.
Your good deeds speak well of you, {karma_title}. Continue on this path.
The undead are souls denied rest. It is our sacred duty to release them from their torment.
Holy water and prayer can turn lesser undead. For greater horrors, we need blessed weapons.
There have been... reports. Near the old cemetery. I pray they are exaggerated.
Necromancy is an abomination. Whoever raises the dead violates the most sacred boundary.
The undead threat persists. We must remain vigilant.
Bring your wounds here. Prayer and herbs together mend what neither can alone.
I treat all who come to me, regardless of coin. The temple provides.
For deep wounds, I use blessed salve and prayer. For illness, herbal teas and rest.
Healing is not just of the body. Many who come here carry wounds of the spirit.
Your elven constitution aids healing. Your people recover quickly.
Dwarven resilience is legendary. You will mend faster than most.
This temple has stood for generations. The stones themselves are saturated with prayer.
We are a small chapel, but the divine does not measure devotion by the size of the building.
The temple is open to all. Day or night, you will find someone here to listen.
We maintain shrines to several gods. Helios has the central altar, but all are honored.
I rise before dawn each day to pray. The quiet hours are when the divine speaks most clearly.
Prayer is not asking for things. It is aligning your will with the greater purpose.
You are welcome to join our evening prayers. The community finds comfort in shared devotion.
A prayer for safe travels? Of course. Bow your head, {player_name}.
Redemption is always possible. The gods do not close their doors to those who truly seek change.
Atonement begins with acknowledgment. Then restitution. And only after both, genuine resolve to change. Most people skip to the last part and wonder why it does not stick.
I have seen the worst sinners become saints. And saints fall to darkness. The path matters more than where you stand.
Your past is heavy, {player_name}. But the weight can be lifted if you are willing.
You carry light in your heart already, {karma_title}. Continue to share it.
